flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Colby-Sawyer College fell 74% between 2021 and 2024 (56.0% → 14.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Colby-Sawyer College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (64.5% → 57.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colby-Sawyer College fell 84% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.3%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Colby-Sawyer College fell 59% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.3k → $19.1k).
